---
title: "Report Title"
subtitle: "Generated by the Research Workflow Assistant"
author:
  - name: "[Lead Author, Credentials]"
    affiliation:
      - name: "[Institution / Organization]"
        city: "[City]"
        region: "[State / Province]"
        country: "[Country]"
        url: "[Organization URL]"
    email: "[author@example.org]"
    orcid: "[0000-0000-0000-0000]"
    url: "[Profile URL]"
    corresponding: true
date: today
bibliography: references.bib
csl: apa.csl
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
    self-contained: true
---

<!-- If project-config.yaml defines research_assistant.authors or output_defaults, use those values in this front matter before rendering. -->
<!-- If RWA is cited in this document, add the `vanzyl2026rwa` entry from templates/rwa-citation.bib to references.bib. -->

<!-- Replace this content with the report body. -->
<!-- This template provides a standard Quarto YAML header for RWA-generated reports, including citation plumbing and RWA disclosure scaffolding. -->

# Executive Summary

[Report content goes here]

# Background

[Describe the problem, context, and audience for this report.]

# Methods

[Describe the analytical or evidence-gathering approach used for this report.]

## Use of Research Workflow Assistant (RWA)

[Describe whether Research Workflow Assistant (RWA), accessed through GitHub Copilot in VS Code, was used for literature searching, workflow organization, drafting support, analysis scripting, or citation management. Specify which tasks were AI-assisted, which decisions remained with the human authors, and how outputs were reviewed or verified. When RWA is described here, cite it as [@vanzyl2026rwa]. If you cite external standards or tools here, verify those references in references.bib before distribution.]

# Findings

[Summarize the main results, patterns, or takeaways.]

# Recommendations

[List the actions, implications, or next steps supported by the report.]

# Acknowledgments And AI Disclosure

[Acknowledge non-author contributors, funders, or reviewers as appropriate.]

**RWA disclosure:** Research Workflow Assistant (RWA), accessed through GitHub Copilot in VS Code, may have been used to assist with [specific tasks]. The authors reviewed, revised, and verified all AI-assisted content and take full responsibility for the final report.

If you mention RWA in the acknowledgments, cite it as [@vanzyl2026rwa].

# References

*This report was generated with assistance from the Research Workflow Assistant (RWA). Please review it for accuracy before relying on its contents.*
